title: Hermetic & Covenant NPC Archetype
note: generate:character target (mode conjunction): roll on any NEW CHARACTER and layer this archetype onto the AC Character Crafter, then flesh from setting-canon (House, covenant, Realm). Gifted NPCs carry the Gift's -3 social penalty (-6 Blatant) unless Gentle Gift; Parma negates it among magi.

entries.value: Archmagus — an ancient, immensely powerful magus rarely seen outside their sanctum.
Young magus — recently Gauntleted, eager to prove themselves and build a reputation.
Quaesitor — a Guernicus-trained investigator empowered to judge crimes against the Code.
Hoplite — a combat-trained magus who enforces Hermetic law by force, backing the Quaesitores.
Redcap — an (often unGifted) Mercere messenger carrying news, letters, and vis between covenants.
Hedge wizard — a magus of an obscure Ex Miscellanea tradition, only nominally Hermetic.
Verditius crafter — a proud enchanter selling magical items, prone to long vendettas.
Suspected diabolist — a magus rumored to deal with demons, shadowed by Quaesitorial suspicion.
Covenant grog-captain — the veteran soldier commanding the covenant's mercenary guards.
Covenant steward / autocrat — the mundane administrator running daily affairs and finances.
Mundane lord or cleric — a noble, bishop, or abbot whose lands or law entangle the covenant.
Faerie-touched peasant — a local villager marked by the fae; useful, unreliable, quietly dangerous.
